name: Carrots Glacees
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the carrots and cut into thin slices.
2. Place the butter in a 4-cup microwave-safe dish.
3. Melt the butter for 1 minute at high heat.
4. Add the sliced carrots and water to the melted butter.
5. Stir well and cover. Microwave for 7 minutes at high heat.
6. Stir, then add the remaining ingredients: mustard, brown sugar, and parsley.
7. Mix until all ingredients are well combined.
8. Microwave uncovered for 5-7 minutes at medium heat, stirring 2 or 3 times during cooking.
